title: A Smart Business Meeting
article_text: The team had a smart idea for the new edition of their magazine. They wanted to add a silver layer to the cover for a special look. The preparation for the meeting was complete, but one member was upset about the agenda. He said a dispute had arisen over the representation of their target audience. The emphasis of the discussion was on being honest with their retail partners. If they had been more honest earlier, they would have avoided the slight disagreement. The supplier had told us that the wire for the binding was unlikely to arrive on time. We had already undertaken the task of finding a new supplier for the wire. The publication of the magazine was a prize for the whole team. I wish my peer had not dominated the conversation about the entertainment section.

image_prompts: A team of people sitting around a table, one person pointing to a magazine with a smart idea written on a whiteboard.
A close-up of a magazine cover with a shiny silver layer being applied by a designer's hand.
A meeting room with a person looking upset while looking at a paper labeled 'Agenda'.
Two colleagues having a heated discussion, with a chart showing 'Target Audience' on the wall.
A businessperson speaking firmly while pointing to a slide that says 'Honesty with Retail Partners'.
Two people shaking hands with relieved expressions, a calendar showing a past date in the background.
A warehouse with a delivery truck arriving late, and a worker holding a coil of wire looking unhappy.
A person at a computer searching for suppliers, with a list titled 'New Supplier' on the desk.
A team celebrating with a magazine that has a 'Prize' ribbon on the cover.
A person in a meeting looking annoyed while another person talks a lot about movies and music.
